title: When Things Break
subtitle: Memory failures, API errors, leaked keys, and crashed sessions. Real problems, real fixes.

sections.heading: Why This Guide Exists
sections.content: Things break. It's not if, it's when. This guide is the reference sheet for the most common failures.

sections.heading: Memory Wouldn't Load
sections.content: Check file paths. Verify permissions. Look for corrupted JSON. Restart the session.

sections.heading: API Key Stopped Working
sections.content: Check expiration. Verify billing. Test in isolation. Rotate if compromised.

sections.heading: Model Wouldn't Respond
sections.content: Check rate limits. Verify the endpoint. Try a smaller request. Check service status.

sections.heading: Session Got Too Big
sections.content: Context window full. Clear unnecessary history. Summarize and restart. Use handoff docs.

sections.heading: I Leaked a Key
sections.content: Rotate immediately. Check usage for unauthorized calls. Update all references. Learn from it.

sections.heading: Agent Modified Its Own Config
sections.content: Restore from backup. Review what changed. Add guardrails. Prevent future self-modification.

sections.heading: Quick-Reference Checklist
sections.content: Step 1: Don't panic. Step 2: Identify the symptom. Step 3: Check this guide. Step 4: If stuck, ask.

key_takeaways: If you leaked a key: rotate immediately, check for unauthorized usage, update all references
Context window full? Summarize, restart, and use handoff docs going forward
Add guardrails to prevent agents from modifying their own configuration files
